releases.title: collectZ v3.4.107
releases.summary: This patch enables an explicit Kavita reset-progress action for chapter-backed Kavita rows while keeping it separate from true chapter unread behavior.

details.heading: Shipped
bullets: Added a scoped `POST /api/media/:id/kavita-reset-progress` endpoint for Kavita chapter-backed rows.
Reset Kavita progress by writing `pageNum: 0` and `bookScrollId: null` through Kavita's progress endpoint.
Added a media detail drawer `Reset Progress` action beside the existing read/progress controls.
Preserved chapter mark-read behavior and continued to prohibit bulk unread endpoints.
Updated Kavita smoke coverage to prove reset progress writes page `0`, returns secret-free readback, and avoids series/volume/multiple unread shortcuts.

releases.title: collectZ v3.4.106
releases.summary: This patch proves the Kavita reset-progress payload shape in the existing fake Kavita-compatible runtime probe without exposing a user-facing reset or unread action.

details.heading: Shipped
bullets: Extended the Kavita progress/read-state contract with a probe-only reset-progress payload.
Added fake-runtime proof for `POST /api/Reader/progress` with `pageNum: 0` and `bookScrollId: null`.
Confirmed the reset-progress probe does not call bulk unread endpoints.
Kept chapter unread and reset-progress UI/routes disabled until real Kavita runtime semantics are proven.

releases.title: collectZ v3.4.105
releases.summary: This patch defines the Kavita chapter unread/read-state reversal boundary after the chapter mark-read implementation. It keeps runtime unread behavior disabled because the checked Kavita OpenAPI snapshot does not expose a chapter-level mark-unread endpoint.

details.heading: Shipped
bullets: Rechecked Kavita's upstream OpenAPI reader/progress surface for unread and reset-progress options.
Documented that series, volume, multiple-volume, and multiple-series unread endpoints are bulk mutations.
Kept progress page `0` as a discovery-only reset-progress candidate, not a true unread action.
Extended the Kavita progress/read-state probe with unread/reversal contract evidence.
Added source assertions to ensure no runtime unread route or UI control was introduced.

releases.title: collectZ v3.4.104
releases.summary: This patch adds the first runtime Kavita read-state action. Workspace admins can explicitly mark a linked Kavita chapter-backed row read in Kavita, using only Kavita's chapter-level mark-read endpoint.

details.heading: Shipped
bullets: Added a scoped `POST /api/media/:id/kavita-read-state` endpoint for Kavita chapter-backed rows.
Calls only `POST /api/Reader/mark-chapter-read` with `seriesId`, `chapterId`, and `generateReadingSession`.
Added a `Mark Read in Kavita` drawer action beside the explicit page/progress controls.
Extended the fake-Kavita import/sync smoke to prove one chapter mark-read call and no bulk read-state calls.
Updated the read-state contract probe so chapter mark-read is enabled while series, volume, panel, KOReader, and unread endpoints remain prohibited.

releases.title: collectZ v3.4.103
releases.summary: This patch defines the Kavita read-state boundary before collectZ exposes any mark read/unread action. The contract documents Kavita's series, volume, and chapter mark endpoints, keeps runtime mark actions disabled, and identifies chapter-level mark-read as the only first candidate for a future implementation.

details.heading: Shipped
bullets: Rechecked Kavita's upstream OpenAPI mark read/unread endpoint shapes.
Documented why series-wide mark read/unread and volume-wide mark read are too broad for the first collectZ action.
Extended the Kavita progress/read-state probe with disabled mark endpoint evidence.
Added source assertions for the read-state contract and chapter-scoped payload shape.
Kept runtime routes, drawer controls, import/sync read-state writes, background polling, KOReader sync, and shared provider abstractions out of scope.

releases.title: collectZ v3.4.102
releases.summary: This patch adds the first explicit Kavita progress writeback and page-proxy reader slice. Chapter-backed Kavita rows can now load a proxied reader page, then save a selected page number back to Kavita without exposing Kavita API keys or bearer tokens to the browser.

details.heading: Shipped
bullets: Added a scoped progress write endpoint for Kavita chapter-backed media rows using `POST /api/Reader/progress`.
Added scoped reader metadata and single-page image proxy endpoints for Kavita chapter-backed rows.
Added media drawer controls to load a Kavita page image, step through pages, and explicitly save progress.
Kept Kavita credentials server-side for reader page and progress calls.
Extended the fake-Kavita import/sync smoke to prove progress writeback, reader metadata readback, page image proxying, and secret-free browser responses.

releases.title: collectZ v3.4.101
releases.summary: This patch adds the first read-only Kavita progress visibility path. Chapter-backed Kavita rows can ask collectZ to read current Kavita chapter progress and show a small progress panel in the media detail drawer.

details.heading: Shipped
bullets: Added a scoped backend read endpoint for Kavita chapter-backed media rows.
Read progress through the workspace-owned Kavita connection using `GET /api/Reader/get-progress`.
Normalized progress readback to page/chapter/series/volume/scroll/timestamp fields.
Added a compact read-only Kavita Progress panel to the media detail drawer for chapter-backed rows.
Extended the fake-Kavita import/sync smoke to prove read-only progress readback and secret-free browser responses.

releases.title: collectZ v3.4.100
releases.summary: This patch defines the first safe Kavita reading-progress sync contract. The contract keeps collectZ link-out/native-reader-first, identifies read-only progress visibility as the next viable implementation, and explicitly keeps progress writeback and embedded reading out of scope.

details.heading: Shipped
bullets: Rechecked Kavita's upstream OpenAPI progress endpoints and documented the read/write boundary.
Added a read-only Kavita progress contract helper.
Added a fake-server progress contract probe that calls only `GET /api/Reader/get-progress`.
Documented why chapter-as-issue rows are the first eligible progress rows.
Kept progress writeback, KOReader sync shortcuts, embedded reading, page proxying, and background polling out of scope.

releases.title: collectZ v3.4.99
releases.summary: This patch makes Kavita metadata writeback more deliberate by letting workspace admins choose the exact changed fields to apply after preview.

details.heading: Shipped
bullets: Added field-level checkboxes to the media-detail Kavita Metadata diff.
Default selected all changed unlocked fields after preview, while unchanged rows remain read-only.
Changed `Apply to Kavita` so it sends only the selected changed fields.
Added selected-field readback beside the existing changed/skipped counts.

releases.title: collectZ v3.4.98
releases.summary: This patch adds the first explicit Kavita metadata writeback apply path. Workspace admins can review the Kavita preview diff and then manually write changed, unlocked collectZ metadata fields to the linked Kavita series or chapter.

details.heading: Shipped
bullets: Added a workspace-admin-only Kavita metadata apply endpoint for Kavita-linked media rows.
Recompute the preview diff immediately before writing so locked, missing, and unchanged fields are not sent.
Added Kavita series and chapter metadata mutation helpers targeting `POST /api/Series/metadata` and `POST /api/Chapter/update`.
Added a guarded `Apply to Kavita` action beside the media-detail Kavita Metadata preview.
Extended the Kavita import/sync smoke fake server to prove series and chapter apply payloads without mutating a real Kavita server.
Added activity/audit events for applied, skipped, and failed writeback attempts.
